channel.title: AL on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in AL on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Autauga County Sheriff’s Office (AL)
item.description:

item.title: ALL POINTS LOGISTICS, LLC — ICE MADISON, AL $998,995
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ALL POINTS LOGISTICS, LLC Award ID: HSCETE11J00463 Amount: $998,994.61 Description: VIDEO STREAMLINING SOLUTION FOR ICE Period: 2011-09-07 to 2012-09-12 Location: MADISON, AL (FIPS: 01089)

item.title: ALTEC INDUSTRIES, INC. — ICE SHELBY, AL $1,935,734
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ALTEC INDUSTRIES, INC. Award ID: 70CMSD20FR0000210 Amount: $1,935,734.00 Description: UTILITY TRUCKS Period: 2020-09-21 to 2023-02-28 Location: SHELBY, AL (FIPS: 01117)

item.title: Baldwin County Cor. Center — Baldwin, AL
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Baldwin County Cor. Center in Baldwin County, AL.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: ETHIC TECH, LLC — ICE MADISON, AL $2,095,240
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: ETHIC TECH, LLC Award ID: 70CMSD23P00000151 Amount: $2,095,240.25 Description: VALUE ADDED RESELLER SUPPORT, VARIOUS COMMERCIAL OFF THE SHELF LICENSES Period: 2023-09-20 to 2026-09-19 Location: MADISON, AL (FIPS: 01089)

item.title: Montgomery City Jail — Montgomery, AL
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Montgomery City Jail in Montgomery County, AL.

item.title: PCI GUIDEHOUSE JV LLC — ICE ESCAMBIA, AL $1,806,496
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: PCI GUIDEHOUSE JV LLC Award ID: 70CMSW25C00000004 Amount: $1,806,496.00 Description: THIS AWARD PROVIDES ICE - OFFICE OF THE CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER WITH PROJECT MANAGEMENT, ADMINISTRATIVE, POSITION MANAGEMENT ANALYSIS, AND IT SYSTEMS SUPPORT. Period: 2025-03-20 to 2026-03-19 Location: ESCAMBIA, AL (FIPS: 01053)

item.title: Perry County Corr. Center — Perry, AL
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Perry County Corr. Center in Perry County, AL.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Perry County, AL — USDA Distress Profile (4 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Perry County, AL with 4 distress indicators:

losing population; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio; low post-secondary education

Full flags: Low Employment, Low PostSecondary Ed, Population Loss, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: Pickens County Det Ctr — Pickens, AL
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: Pickens County Det Ctr in Pickens County, AL.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)

item.title: Pickens County, AL — USDA Distress Profile (4 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Pickens County, AL with 4 distress indicators:

government/corrections-dependent economy; losing population; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio

Full flags: Government, Low Employment, Population Loss, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: metro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition

item.title: SUMMOME NATIVE VENTURES LLC — ICE ESCAMBIA, AL $3,852,258
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: SUMMOME NATIVE VENTURES LLC Award ID: 70CMSW23P00000014 Amount: $3,852,257.74 Description: BODY WORN CAMERA PROGRAM SUPPORT SERVICES TO SUPPORT OFTP Period: 2023-04-20 to 2025-10-06 Location: ESCAMBIA, AL (FIPS: 01053)
